tools.name: phoenix_relink_check
tools.description: Detect a phoenix / rebrand relink that exact-match screeners miss. Given a principal or entity name (e.g. a debarred contractor, an excluded provider, or an OFAC-listed party), this fuzzy-relinks it to NEWLY-FORMED Secretary-of-State business entities that share the name AND a second independent sig

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "phoenix_relink_check" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Detect a phoenix / rebrand relink that exact-match screeners miss. Given a principal or entity name (e.g. a debarred contractor, an excluded provider, or an OFA…

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: phoenix_relink_check · Public sink: phoenix_relink_check.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: phoenix_relink_check · Public sink: phoenix_relink_check

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
